channel.title: Bigquery on Indrajith Indraprastham
channel.description: Recent content in Bigquery on Indrajith Indraprastham

item.title: Creating Cohort Retention Analysis in BigQuery: A Comprehensive Guide
item.description: Cohort retention analysis is one of those things that sounds fancy but boils down to a simple question: are your users coming back? This post walks through building it from scratch in BigQuery — no external datasets, just a small synthetic table we’ll create together. What is a Cohort? A cohort is a group of users who share a common starting point — usually their first interaction with your product.
